pdfium 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • How pdfium is built
  • Changelog

Package index

Documents

pdf_open()
Open a PDF document
pdf_close()
Close a PDF document
pdf_page_count()
Count pages in a PDF document

Pages

pdf_load_page()
Load a single page from an open PDF document
pdf_close_page()
Close a page handle
pdf_page_size()
Page dimensions in PDF points
pdf_page_rotation()
Page rotation in degrees

Page objects

pdf_page_objects()
Enumerate the objects on a page
pdf_obj_type()
Report the type of a page object
pdf_obj_bounds()
Axis-aligned bounding box of a page object

Paths

pdf_path_segments()
Path segments of a path page-object

On this page

Developed by Bill Denney.
